title: Amazing Digital Plushies
description: Adds plushies from "The Amazing Digital Circus" web series!
body:
## 🃏✨ About this mod
ADPlushies adds characters in plushie form from the web youtube series "The Amazing Digital Circus"!, created by Gooseworks and Glitch Productions.

## 🎒🖥️ How to obtain plushies
Some old company used to make busted computer systems some time ago. Though most forgot, you seem to remember how to make them! Now, when using one of these computers, you will be able to play a small gloink-catch minigame where each gloink grants one point, gather enough points and buy yourself some plushies!

![C&A Computer Display + Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e33115198edd04216e1b6e980ea632b564d2e734.png)

## 🧵💻 List of plushies (v1.0.0) [8 Plushies]
- Pomni
- Jax
- Ragatha
- Kinger
- Gangle (+Happy mask)
- Zooble
- Caine
- Bubble

## 🗂📐More Info & Other Details
- More plushies are planned for future updates (Gummigoo, Disappearing Guy, etc).
- Feel free to use any of my mods in your modpacks!
